_comment: BugBuster Pro — Realtime Database rules. PROTOTYPE posture: the app has no Firebase Auth, so cross-device sync relies on open access to the store/ subtree. Writes are restricted to the bb_ key whitelist (no arbitrary paths) and values are shape-checked. PRODUCTION: enable Firebase Authentication and replace the rules below with per-actor rules (e.g. only signed-in staff may write bb_bookings status; customers may write only their own booking). Publish via Firebase console → Realtime Database → Rules.
